title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama official repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and CLI wrapper for Ollama; exposes chat, generate, embed, list, delete, pull.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings with LCEL and legacy chains.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, custom timeouts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI wrapper around Ollama with prompt history, markdown rendering, and session save/load.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension backed by Ollama models running locally.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama server and CLI, enabling reproducible deployments across macOS/Linux.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector, PVC, and ingress.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple React chat app using Vite and the Ollama REST API; no backend needed.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation pipeline combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that queries local Ollama models via slash commands and supports multi-user threads.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-functions
summary: Official example showing how to expose OpenAI-style function calling with Modelfile templates.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server using Socket-Mode to talk to Ollama; handles threads, reactions, and ephemeral messages.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder components.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models, dependency-injection helpers, and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for CodeLlama, WizardMath, Zephyr, SQLCoder, and more.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama REST API with Tokio, serde, and native TLS; includes chat & embed helpers.
